meaning: adv.在空中,象空气一样,空想地
examples: Coped well with Zalayeta aerially, but was a little slow on the floor on occasions.
Thus, it was more difficult to find the blood in that time when there was not blood bank or could not aerially transport blood.
The only sour note of the first 45 minutes was the booking of Gabriel Agbonlahor for using an arm when challenging aerially with Bjarsmyr, ruling him out of the final.
